name: Doris Matsui
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $232,127 for Doris Matsui in U.S. House, CA-07. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
